3238290.name: Rift Drift
3238290.description:
Rift Drift is an infinite drifting game where you pilot customizable rockets through procedurally generated tracks and biomes.

Built around momentum, flow, and minimalism, it’s a game about mastering movement, chasing records, or simply enjoying the ride.

Choose between infinite runs or focused time trials. Drift fast, drift smooth, and find your rhythm across a variety of level biomes with unique shapes and obstacles.

Features

  • Momentum based drifting

  • No speed cap

  • Infinite mode

  • A galaxy of levels

Rift Drift invites you to master the art of momentum-based drifting as you pilot customizable rockets through a universe of procedurally generated tracks. Whether you're chasing a zen-like flow or an adrenaline-fueled race, each run offers new challenges and infinite replayability. Drift, boost, and discover diverse landscapes, upgrade your craft, and set new records!
